Table	Create Table
music_tracks	CREATE TABLE `music_tracks` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `title` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `artist` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `album` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `genre` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `duration` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `file_url` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `cover_art_url` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `bpm` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `key_signature` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `energy_level` decimal(3,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_public` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `play_count` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
